questions.question: Briefly explain the concept of 'Rapid Elasticity' in cloud computing. (2 marks)
keyPoints: Ability to scale resources outward and inward

questions.question: Compare and contrast Cloud and Grid computing platforms. Discuss at least four key points of comparison. (5 marks)
keyPoints: Primary Goal: Cloud as utility service vs. Grid for collaborative problem-solving
Access Model: On-demand self-service (Cloud) vs. Scheduled/batch (Grid)
